color.grading_style: Modern clean style with a subtle Cyan/Blue tint in the shadows

composition.focus_point: Raspberry and powdered sugar on the front bowl
composition.composition_rule: Central composition with a triangular arrangement of elements

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent rendering of raspberry texture and individual powdered sugar particles

improvement_notes: For a more dramatic effect, increase the backlight and use negative fill to deepen shadows. A warmer color temperature could enhance a sweet, emotional mood. Applying the rule of thirds would create a more dynamic composition.
nano_banana_prompt: professional food photography of [FOOD NAME], 45-degree angle shot, close-up, on a bright white marble surface, bright and airy mood, illuminated by soft natural window light from the upper left, creating soft and gentle shadows on the right, shallow depth of field with a beautifully blurred background, clean and fresh color palette with a slightly cool white balance, vibrant colors, tack-sharp focus on the food texture, shot on 85mm lens, f/2.8, hyper-detailed, clean aesthetics, commercial quality
